subject: Science
chapter: Our Home: Earth, a Unique Life Sustaining Planet
source_pdf: Chapter 13 - Our Home Earth A Unique Life Sustaining Planet.pdf

activities_projects.title: Features that Make Earth Special
activities_projects.objective: Identify important features that make Earth suitable for life
steps: List features of Earth such as atmosphere, water, gravity, and sunlight
Explain how each feature supports life
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the factors that make Earth habitable
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct listing and explanation of features (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Solar System Comparison Activity
activities_projects.objective: Compare planets based on temperature, size, and atmosphere
steps: Collect information about the eight planets
Record average temperature, size, and atmosphere
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand why Earth is unique among planets
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of information and presentation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Habitable Zone Demonstration
activities_projects.objective: Understand the concept of the habitable zone
steps: Place the lamp at the center
Place one ball very close, one at medium distance, and one far away
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand why Earth’s distance from the Sun is important
activities_projects.evaluation: Explanation of the habitable zone (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Atmosphere Importance Experiment
activities_projects.objective: Understand how the atmosphere protects Earth
steps: Place the thermometer inside the jar
Cover the jar with plastic wrap
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about the greenhouse effect

activities_projects.title: Magnetic Field Demonstration
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of Earth’s magnetic field
steps: Place the magnet under a sheet of paper
Discuss how Earth's magnetic field protects the planet
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn how magnetic fields work

activities_projects.title: Water Cycle Model
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of water in sustaining life
steps: Observe condensation forming on the plastic

activities_projects.title: Plant and Soil Relationship Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand how soil supports plant growth
steps: Add fertilizer to one pot only
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the importance of nutrients in soil

activities_projects.title: Food Chain Chart
steps: Draw a food chain with plants, herbivores, and carnivores
Discuss the importance of balance in ecosystems

activities_projects.title: Climate Change Awareness Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand causes and effects of climate change
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of research and presentation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Earth Protection Pledge
steps: Write a pledge to protect Earth
Include actions like saving water and reducing pollution
